title: VulkGod
description: an Optimized Modpack Based On Vulkan For Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
# VulkGod + Hypixel Skyblock

![Vulkgod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e90bf0052d0398b83d5c7a72d64c9c64d533b6c_0.webp)

---

![Hub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9640cc6dfbcd4b4d9134fb4fd3b447e73853c8cd.jpeg)

**A Fabric modpack built for insane FPS in modern Hypixel SkyBlock, powered by VulkanMod.**

## ✅ What’s inside?

- 🚀 **Vulkan Powered –** Replaces old OpenGL for massive FPS boosts and ultra-smooth gameplay.

- 🏝 **Modern SkyBlock Ready –** Pre-loaded with **Skyblocker** & **SkyHanni** for custom HUDs, dungeon solvers, and overlays.

- 📦 **Ultimate Inventory –** Features **Firmament** (the modern NEU) for item searching and storage management.

- 🧼 **Minimal & Clean –** Uses **No Frills** and smart tweaks. Just the essential SkyBlock and FPS mods you need.

- ⚡️ **1.21.11 Optimized –** Fully updated for the modern era of Hypixel.


## 📥 Easy to Install
Drop it into the Modrinth App or Prism Launcher, click play and you’re in. 
No messy configs, no extra setup. Just high-FPS SkyBlock.
